title: Baton Proof Bundle
description: The machine-readable facts of one slice's proof bundle (Rule 6), generated from live repo state. The human-readable proof.md is rendered from this record. Every Rule 6 section is present; empty arrays are valid where the rule allows (e.g. nothing deferred, no divergence).

scope.description: One sentence: what the slice was meant to deliver.

files_changed.description: Output of git diff --name-only against the base branch.

test_results.description: Slice-relevant test commands and their outcomes (not the full suite — the merge gate owns that).

output_ref.description: Path to captured output, if retained.

reachability.description: Rule 1 reachability artefact — proof the feature is reachable through its integration point, not just a leaf test.

evidence.description: Path, command + output, or explicit 'do X, observe Y' smoke step.

delivered.description: Each delivered item with an evidence reference.

evidence.description: File, test name, or artefact path.

not_delivered.description: Each not-delivered item surfaced as a Rule 2 deferral. Empty array is valid (nothing deferred).

acknowledged.description: True when the decision-maker was told in plain text.

divergence.description: Any implementation that differs from the plan. Empty array is valid, but the section must be present.
